negative.name: Pit Trap
negative.description: The floor gives way beneath you!
negative.message: You fall into a pit trap and take 15 damage!

negative.name: Poison Dart Trap
negative.description: A dart flies from the wall!
negative.message: A poison dart hits you! -10 HP.

negative.name: Cursed Shrine
negative.description: You touch a dark altar and feel a chill...
negative.message: A curse falls upon you! One of your stats is reduced for the next 5 combats.

negative.name: Ambush!
negative.message: You're ambushed! -10 HP before combat begins!

negative.name: Goblin Thief
negative.description: A sneaky goblin snatches something from your pack!
negative.message: A goblin thief stole an item from your inventory!

negative.name: Mana Drain
negative.description: An arcane ward siphons your magical energy.

negative.name: Exhausting Hallway
negative.description: The air in this corridor is thick and stifling.
negative.message: The stifling air saps your stamina! -15 SP.

negative.name: Deadly Trap
negative.description: A blade swings from the ceiling!

negative.name: Weakening Fog
negative.description: A strange fog fills the room, sapping your strength.
negative.message: A weakening fog reduces your Strength and Dexterity by 2 for the next 3 combats!

negative.name: Crumbling Floor
negative.description: The floor collapses and some of your gold falls into the abyss.
negative.message: Some of your gold falls into a chasm! Lost 10% of your gold.

positive.name: Healing Spring
positive.description: You discover a glowing spring of clear water.
positive.message: You drink from the healing spring! Restored 30% of your max HP.

positive.name: Mana Well
positive.description: An ancient well pulses with arcane energy.
positive.message: You draw power from the mana well! Restored 40% of your max Mana.

positive.name: Stamina Shrine
positive.description: A warrior's shrine invigorates your body.
positive.message: The shrine restores your stamina! Restored 50% of your max SP.

positive.name: Treasure Chest
positive.description: You find an unlocked treasure chest!
positive.message: You found gold in a treasure chest!

positive.name: Potion Cache
positive.description: A shelf of potions sits untouched in the corner.

positive.name: Warrior's Blessing
positive.description: A spectral warrior salutes you and grants you strength.
positive.message: Warrior's Blessing! +5% Strength for the next 3 combats.

positive.name: Thief's Blessing
positive.description: A shadow whispers secrets of agility to you.
positive.message: Thief's Blessing! +5% Dexterity for the next 3 combats.

positive.name: Sacred Fountain
positive.description: A radiant fountain fully restores your body and mind.
positive.message: The sacred fountain fully restores your HP, Mana, and SP!

positive.name: Ancient Tome
positive.description: You read an ancient tome of knowledge.
positive.message: You gained knowledge from the ancient tome!

positive.name: Hidden Stash
positive.description: Behind a loose stone, you find a hidden stash!
positive.message: You found a rare item in a hidden stash!

neutral.name: Empty Room
neutral.description: The room is dusty and abandoned. Nothing of note here.
neutral.message: You find an empty room. Nothing happens.

neutral.name: Old Bones
neutral.description: Scattered bones of a previous adventurer lie on the ground.
neutral.message: You find the remains of a fallen adventurer. A sobering sight.

neutral.name: Strange Writing
neutral.description: Ancient runes are carved into the walls. You can't read them.
neutral.message: Strange runes cover the walls. Their meaning is lost to time.

neutral.name: Echoing Chamber
neutral.description: Your footsteps echo loudly through this vast chamber.
neutral.message: Your footsteps echo through a vast, empty chamber.

neutral.name: Dripping Water
neutral.description: Water drips steadily from the ceiling into a stagnant pool.
neutral.message: Water drips from the ceiling. The sound is oddly calming.

neutral.name: Faded Mural
neutral.description: A once-beautiful mural decorates the wall, now barely visible.
neutral.message: A faded mural depicts an ancient battle. The details are lost.

neutral.name: Cold Breeze
neutral.description: A cold breeze blows through a crack in the wall.
neutral.message: A cold breeze blows through. You shiver but press on.

neutral.name: Loose Coins
neutral.description: A few coins glint on the floor.
neutral.message: You pick up a few loose coins from the floor.
